steps.title: Identify the distance formula
steps.content:
To find how far the bird travels, we use the relationship:
$$\text{distance} = \text{speed} \times \text{time}$$
We're given a speed of $16$ m/s and a time of $4$ s.

steps.title: Calculate the distance
steps.content:
Substitute the given values into the formula:
$$\text{distance} = 16 \text{ m/s} \times 4 \text{ s} = 64 \text{ m}$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
